name: Salmon Nicoise Salad
recipeInstructions:
1. Wash and dry the lettuce. Arrange the leaves on a large serving platter.
2. Toss together the green beans, tomato wedges, red pepper slices, and red onion slices. Arrange these on top of the lettuce.
3. Drain any excess liquid from the canned salmon and flake it into small pieces.
4. Arrange the flaked salmon over the vegetable mixture.
5. Drizzle the Classic Vinaigrette evenly over the salad just before serving.
Classic Vinaigrette:
1. Whisk together all ingredients until well combined.
